Product description:
The 701 Bead Grip® wheel was designed to be the perfect wheel for overland enthusiasts. The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire. The valve was strategically placed for extra protection in harsh riding environments.

Our unique Bahia Blue color, inspired by the coastline of the Baja peninsula, is sure to transform your ride into a show stopper.

Product description:
The 502 VT-Spec Wheel was developed for the Factory Subaru Rally Team that’s overseen by Vermont Sports car. Think of it as the 15 in. version of the Rally wheel version. Some other key differences are the stainless steel lug hole inserts for increased durability in race environments. The VT-Spec also has a higher load rating of 2100 lbs. Unlike the Rally wheels, the VT-Spec will not clear OEM Subaru STI brakes, but will clear Subaru WRX 4-pot brakes up to 2014, AP Racing CP6720 calipers and most brake packages with rotors up to 300mm in diameter.

The unique gold color was originally developed as a custom shade for Travis Pastrana and Brandon Semenuk's Subaru STI rally cars built by Vermont Sports Car, and is now available to the public.

BRAKE FITMENT TECHNICAL DRAWING

Product description:
The 502 Rally Wheel features a unique 10 windowed design with a debossed METHOD logos. It has been over-engineered to exceed SAE 2530 specifications, with a strong 1850 lbs load rating and a screw-on center cap. Subaru STI owners will be excited to learn that the 502 Rally wheels will clear the Brembo brakes that came from the factory.

The MR502 is hub centric for Mitsubishi applications (67.1mm hubs) and will include a hub ring for Subaru fitment (56.1mm hubs).
The 17" will clear all model year Subaru/Mitsubishi vehicles with Brembo Brakes.
The 18" will clear Tesla Model Y Performance Package.


This wheel features a black one-piece screw-on center cap

The 701 lineup also offers popular van fitments.

Product description:
The 701 Bead Grip® wheel was designed to be the perfect wheel for overland enthusiasts. The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead.

It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire. The valve was strategically placed for extra protection in harsh riding environments.


The 701 lineup also offers popular van fitments.

Product description:
The 704 Bead Grip® wheel has a timeless 12 spoke design that will compliment any vehicle's style. Developed for off-road enthusiasts who are hauling a little extra with them, this Heavy Duty (HD) wheel boasts a load rating of 4,500 lbs. for maximum payload.

The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire.

Product description:
The 707 brings the rally inspired design of the 407 UTV Bead Grip to trucks, SUVs, and CUVs. Available in popular fitments in both Bahia Blue and Matte Black incorporating the Method exclusive Bead Grip® technology for unrivaled tire security at lower pressures. 


The 707 boasts a solid A356 aluminum construction with T6 heat treatment and ultra strong 1,850-3,640 lb load ratings.


Patented Bead Grip technology integrates grooves, found on both the inner and outer bead seat, to engage the tire bead for a stronger hold under extreme side load and lower air pressures. The wheel’s 'safety hump' also gets a more aggressive profile which further stabilizes the tire bead in the seat for increased security. This allows the user to run lower tire pressures that would have previously required beadlocks while saving weighing and remaining street legal.

Product description:
The 706 Bead Grip® brings our classic style of the 312 to our Bead Grip lineup. The classic six point styling paired with our patented Bead Grip technology for the ultimate security at low tire pressures. 

The 6x5.5 and 5x150 models with the "Tall Cap" designation are specifically designed with the 80 and 100 Land Cruisers in mind. The cap on these models has extra height to clear the stock hubs on the 80 and 100 Series. Please note, however that this new cap will not work with other versions of the 706 or Bead Grip wheel series. 

The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire.

Another key difference is the stainless steel lug hole inserts for increased durability in race environments. Unlike the Rally wheels, the VT-Spec will not clear OEM Subaru STI brakes, but will clear Subaru WRX 4-pot brakes up to 2014, AP Racing CP6720 calipers and most brake packages with rotors up to 300mm in diameter.

Product description:
The 502 Rally Wheel features a unique 10 windowed design with a debossed METOHD logos. It has been over-engineered to exceed SAE 2530 specifications, with a strong 1850 lbs load rating and a screw-on center cap. Subaru STI owners will be excited to learn that the 502 Rally wheels will clear the Brembo brakes that came from the factory.

The MR502 is hub centric for Mitsubishi applications (67.1mm hubs) and will include a hub ring for Subaru fitment (56.1mm hubs).
The 16" wheel model will clear pre-2018 model year vehicles with STI Brembo Brakes.
The 17" & 18" wheel will clear all model year Subaru/Mitsubishi vehicles with Brembo Brakes.
The 18" will clear Tesla Model Y Performance Package.

Product description:
The 502 Rally Wheel features a unique 10 windowed design with a debossed METHOD logos. It has been over-engineered to exceed SAE 2530 specifications, with a strong 1850 lbs load rating and a screw-on center cap. Subaru STI owners will be excited to learn that the 502 Rally wheels will clear the Brembo brakes that came from the factory.

The MR502 is hub centric for Mitsubishi applications (67.1mm hubs) and will include a hub ring for Subaru fitment (56.1mm hubs).
The 16" wheel model will clear pre-2018 model year vehicles with STI Brembo Brakes.
The 17" & 18" wheel will clear all model year Subaru/Mitsubishi vehicles with Brembo Brakes.
The 18" will clear Tesla Model Y Performance Package.

Product description:
The 502 VT-Spec Wheel was developed for the Factory Subaru Rally Team that’s overseen by Vermont Sports car. Think of it as the 15 in. version of the Rally wheel version. Some other key differences are the stainless steel lug hole inserts for increased durability in race environments. The VT-Spec also has a higher load rating of 2100 lbs. Unlike the Rally wheels, the VT-Spec will not clear OEM Subaru STI brakes, but will clear Subaru WRX 4-pot brakes up to 2014, AP Racing CP6720 calipers and most brake packages with rotors up to 300mm in diameter.

BRAKE FITMENT TECHNICAL DRAWING

Product description:
The 701 Bead Grip® wheel was designed to be the perfect wheel for overland enthusiasts. The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead.

It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire. The valve was strategically placed for extra protection in harsh riding environments.


The 701 lineup also offers popular van fitments.

Product description:
The 703 Bead Grip® wheel was developed for off-road enthusiasts and designed to handle the toughest trails and your next overland adventure. An iconic 12 window design and dual debossed METHOD logos help set your ride apart from the rest.

The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire.

The 703 lineup also offers popular van fitments.

Product description:
The 705 Bead Grip® wheel features a bold split 5-spoke, 10 windowed design with adventure and exploration in mind. It has been developed to handle the toughest trails, roughest deserts, or your next overland adventure. 

The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire.

Product description:
The 706 Bead Grip® brings our classic style of the 312 to our Bead Grip lineup. The classic six point styling paired with our patented Bead Grip technology for the ultimate security at low tire pressures. 

The 6x5.5 and 5x150 models with the "Tall Cap" designation are specifically designed with the 80 and 100 Land Cruisers in mind. The cap on these models has extra height to clear the stock hubs on the 80 and 100 Series. Please note, however that this new cap will not work with other versions of the 706 or Bead Grip wheel series. 

The Bead Grip® technology allows deflation of tires down to pressures that previously would have required beadlock wheels to make sure tires didn’t debead. It’s advantageous to reduce tire inflation pressure while off-roading to increase a tire’s contact patch surface area for better traction on loose surfaces as well as improve ride comfort by effectively reducing the spring rate of the tire.

Product description:
The 707 brings the rally inspired design of the 407 UTV Bead Grip to trucks, SUVs, and CUVs. Available in popular fitments in both Bahia Blue and Matte Black incorporating the Method exclusive Bead Grip® technology for unrivaled tire security at lower pressures. 


The 707 boasts a solid A356 aluminum construction with T6 heat treatment and ultra strong 1,850-3,640 lb load ratings.


Patented Bead Grip technology integrates grooves, found on both the inner and outer bead seat, to engage the tire bead for a stronger hold under extreme side load and lower air pressures. The wheel’s 'safety hump' also gets a more aggressive profile which further stabilizes the tire bead in the seat for increased security. This allows the user to run lower tire pressures that would have previously required beadlocks while saving weighing and remaining street legal.

The 901 Dually Wheel features Method’s iconic 12 window design with debossed logos for Mercedes Sprinter and Ford Transit vans. This 6 lug application offers a maximum payload rating of 3,000-3300 lbs. Transit model requires valve stem extension kit MH-W529-TPMS for installation.
